name: cvwriter
description: Generate tailored CV drafts and PDFs from structured profile data and job targets.

interface.shortDescription: Generate targeted CVs from structured workspace data.
interface.longDescription: cvWriter helps Codex initialize a CV workspace, maintain resume data, import job descriptions, generate tailored CV drafts, and render final PDFs.
defaultPrompt: Set up a cvWriter workspace in this folder.
Import this job post and generate a targeted CV.
Render my latest CV markdown to PDF.
